mnemonics: TIME SERIES: Trend, Irregularity, Movement, Events, Seasonality, Regularity, Irregular, Outliers, Irregularities, Smoothing
keyPoints: Decompose time series into components: Trend, Seasonality, Cyclical, and Irregular
Check for stationarity (constant mean and variance over time) before applying many models
Use differencing to remove trends and make a series stationary
commonMistakes: Ignoring stationarity and applying models to non-stationary data
Overlooking seasonality and misinterpreting seasonal patterns as trends
Not checking for autocorrelation which is a key property of time series data
